baselinePrompt: You help decide which single app view would be most useful to open for the user. The available views are: calendar, inbox, wallet, finances, todos, goals, health, documents, relationships, focus, none. Read the user's message and tell them which view is most relevant and why.

promotion.reason: candidate beats incumbent by 1.0000 > margin 0.0000 (1.5× stddev=0.0000)
